lockingPolicy.lockReason: Bugfix-fastlane real wiring fix; scenarios drive the single-scope-gate red→green proof through the real router.

tdd.redGreenEvidence: go test re-runs captured in report.md '## Test Evidence': RED = TestExtensionIngest_CanonicalScopeReachesHandler FAILs (403, body required:["extension:bookmarks"]) against the two-scope wiring; GREEN = PASS after the gate is restored to the single canonical scope; adversarial re-RED confirms a revert re-fails.

scenarios.title: Canonical single-scope per-user token reaches the extension ingest handler
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: A per-user PASETO with Scopes=["extension:bookmarks,history"] POSTing to /v1/connectors/extension/ingest through the real NewRouter reaches the ingest handler (not 403). Red before the fix, green after.

scenarios.title: A per-user token without the canonical scope is still rejected 403
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: A per-user PASETO with no scope claim (legacy spec-044 token) POSTing to /v1/connectors/extension/ingest is rejected 403 — the gate keeps enforcing after the fix.

scenarios.title: Broader internal/api regression suite stays green with the fix and new tests
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: The full internal/api package (router, auth middleware, handlers) runs green (ok 9.435s) with the two new regression tests included — no collateral regression from the wiring change.
